content.text:
cd /workspace/project/tb-difficulty-tuner && export PINECONE_API_KEY="pcsk_3Vsf8s_UoX9xAA4AzvCu6kJFoAYxMs33WKzL3VdtgMpK2tSQUodh3oVBM62BnSZn22Zgzr" && python3 << 'EOF'
import os
from pinecone import Pinecone
pc = Pinecone(api_key=os.environ["PINECONE_API_KEY"])
index = pc.Index("agent-task-benchmark")
# Get ALL step IDs
all_steps = []
for ids in index.list(namespace="steps"):
    all_steps.extend(ids)
print(f"Total steps in index: {len(all_steps)}")
# Get steps for a specific trial that has steps
# Looking for terminus-2 lr-warmup-scheduler which had 12 steps
sample_steps = [s for s in all_steps if "trial_6038fbee" in s][:5]
print(f"\nSample step IDs: {sample_steps}")
if sample_steps:
    fetched = index.fetch(ids=sample_steps, namespace="steps")
    for sid, vec in fetched.vectors.items():
        print(f"\n{'='*60}")
        print(f"Step: {sid}")
        meta = vec.metadata
        for k, v in sorted(meta.items()):
            val_str = str(v)[:500] if len(str(v)) < 500 else str(v)[:500] + "..."
            print(f"  {k}: {val_str}")
EOF

observation.command:
cd /workspace/project/tb-difficulty-tuner && export PINECONE_API_KEY="pcsk_3Vsf8s_UoX9xAA4AzvCu6kJFoAYxMs33WKzL3VdtgMpK2tSQUodh3oVBM62BnSZn22Zgzr" && python3 << 'EOF'
import os
from pinecone import Pinecone

pc = Pinecone(api_key=os.environ["PINECONE_API_KEY"])
index = pc.Index("agent-task-benchmark")

# Get ALL step IDs
all_steps = []
for ids in index.list(namespace="steps"):
    all_steps.extend(ids)

print(f"Total steps in index: {len(all_steps)}")

# Get steps for a specific trial that has steps
# Looking for terminus-2 lr-warmup-scheduler which had 12 steps
sample_steps = [s for s in all_steps if "trial_6038fbee" in s][:5]
print(f"\nSample step IDs: {sample_steps}")

if sample_steps:
    fetched = index.fetch(ids=sample_steps, namespace="steps")
    for sid, vec in fetched.vectors.items():
        print(f"\n{'='*60}")
        print(f"Step: {sid}")
        meta = vec.metadata
        for k, v in sorted(meta.items()):
            val_str = str(v)[:500] if len(str(v)) < 500 else str(v)[:500] + "..."
            print(f"  {k}: {val_str}")
EOF
